title: Advanced Tools Mastery
description: Adds New 3D Tools to craft with Vanilla Ore
body: ![banner](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/456482184686206999/1056557770368897024/banner.png) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) # 📚 ****About**** > ADANCED TOOLS is a vanilla inspired mod that adds new 3D version of the original minecraft tiers of tools ! It also adds new 3D swords and magical staff for the Bosses of vanilla minecraft. > # 🎮 Content ✔️ All ore tiers now have an advanced version for the crafting recipe of this mod ✔️ Iron/Gold/Diamond and Netherite has now a new 3D version for all the tools and swords ! ✔️ Craftable 3D Wither war hammer, allowing to launch explosive wither skulls 💀 ✔️ Craftable 3D Ender Dragon Staff with magical power imitating the famous dragon # 🔧 ****Crafting recipes**** > Most of the crafting recipes are intuitive and similar to Vanilla Minecraft ## Advanced Ores ![ores](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/456482184686206999/1056273982611009646/ezgif.com-gif-maker.gif) ## Advanced Tools ![tools](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/456482184686206999/1056273982086729768/ezgif.com-gif-maker.gif) ## Bosses Tools War Hammer Of the Wither : ![wither](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/456482184686206999/1056273981767946240/ezgif.com-gif-maker_1.gif) Ender Dragon Staff : ![ender_dragon](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/456482184686206999/1056273981365301258/ezgif.com-gif-maker_2.gif) # 📍 Compatibility > ADVANCED TOOLS is compatible with modpack such as the [Better MC [FABRIC]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-mc-fabric) > # 📣 Disclaimer > This mod is only distributed through **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-netherite-fabric)** and **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-tools-mastery)**. Please do not redistribute this mod or download this mod from any other download source. > > > For more detail on mod reposts, and how to stay protected against them, visit: **[stopmodreposts.org](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fstopmodreposts.org%252f)**. > > You can do what you want with this mod, just credit the author. >
